tiny_practice.action: Pause and reflect: What does it mean to do right, but not with a 'loyal heart'? Breathe deeply and examine your own motivations.

two_step.reflect_question: How can you ensure your actions align with genuine spiritual commitment?

options.response: Set aside weekly time for honest spiritual inventory
Find a trusted mentor or spiritual advisor to review your motivations
Develop a daily practice of asking God to reveal your heart's true intentions

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a picture representing the difference between doing the right thing and doing the right thing with a loyal heart

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter challenged your understanding of spiritual integrity?
options: I see that actions alone aren't enough
Loyalty to God requires consistent heart alignment
External obedience can mask internal disconnection

three_choice.question: Which aspect of leadership most resonates with you in this chapter?

choices.expansion: Amaziah's adherence to Mosaic law regarding punishment demonstrates principled leadership.
His military campaigns and strategic thinking reveal a desire to establish national power.
Despite doing 'right', Amaziah's heart was not fully committed to God's path.

socratic_nudge.question: How does partial obedience differ fundamentally from true spiritual commitment?

moral_slider.question: To what extent can a leader's personal spiritual compromise affect a nation's destiny?

reevaluation.question: How has your understanding of leadership transformed after examining this text?
options: Leaders must balance justice and mercy
Spiritual integrity matters more than external actions
Personal faith directly impacts national outcomes
Consistency between internal motivation and external behavior is crucial

thematic_summaries.title: Partial Obedience
thematic_summaries.summary: King Amaziah demonstrates a form of righteousness that is incomplete and externally motivated. His actions reveal a pattern of following divine instructions superficially without genuine heart transformation.

thematic_summaries.title: Divine Accountability
thematic_summaries.summary: God holds leaders responsible for their spiritual leadership and decisions, measuring not just external compliance but internal motivations and faithfulness. Amaziah's mixed spiritual legacy illustrates the complexity of royal stewardship.

reevaluation.question: How does Amaziah's leadership reveal the nuances of spiritual authenticity?
options: External actions can mask internal spiritual deficiency
Partial obedience is equivalent to disobedience
God evaluates heart motivation beyond ritualistic compliance
